calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justin Goodwin for (petitioners) Anthony Williams & Christopher Williams.

The court asked about the amended inventory and the billings regarding time. Mr. Goodwin reported that it was cash that came from the trust, that the trust was liquidated and distributed and that it is in the firms trust account and that the only reason for the probate was to provide standing to sue the Dolores Williams trust. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-08-2015 Continued To Jul-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Continued To Jul-08-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justin Goodwin for and with Anthony Williams and Christopher Williams.

Mr. Goodwin stated that the value of the estate is currently quite small and that it holds a sail boat. Mr. Goodwin also stated that probate was only opened to pass through a Trust bequest for less than $100,000.00 from the Decedent's Mother and that they are trying to figure out the exact amount. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Holographic Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
